name: 单文件bug修复
description: 测试在单个文件中修复bug的能力

messages.content: 请修复calculator.js中的bug：divide函数缺少对除数为0的检查。请添加适当的错误处理。

grader.command: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const code = fs.readFileSync('calculator.js', 'utf8'); const hasZeroCheck = code.includes('if (b === 0)') || code.includes('b === 0'); const hasThrow = code.includes('throw') && (code.includes('除数') || code.includes('zero') || code.includes('Zero')); console.log(JSON.stringify({passed: hasZeroCheck && hasThrow, score: (hasZeroCheck && hasThrow) ? 100 : 0}))"
